top_signals.title: Renault to abstain on Nissan board appointment
top_signals.summary: Non-executive director was proponent of push to merge Japanese group with rival Honda
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SNAP restrictions could change what shoppers buy — and food giants are watching
top_signals.summary: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.
